description: A project has been completed and all payments settled. The PM must formally archive the project.

nodes.task_description: Run a final project closeout report, summarizing schedule performance, cost performance, and major issues.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive closeout report is generated.

nodes.task_description: Gather all project documents, including contracts, drawings, RFIs, and submittals, into a single archive file.
Set the project status to 'Archived' in the project management system, making it read-only.
